sql_array: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_json; CREATE TABLE test_json(json JSON) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT distinctJSONPaths(json) FROM test_json WHERE distinctJSONPaths(json) != [];
SELECT json, DISTINCT DISTINCTJSONPaths(json) AS paths FROM (SELECT json FROM test_json) GROUP BY json HAVING paths[1] != 'c.d.e';
WITH (SELECT json FROM test_json WHERE json != '{}') AS non_empty_json SELECT DISTINCT distinctJSONPaths(json) FROM non_empty_json;
CREATE TABLE test_json_edges (id Int32, json JSON) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO test_json_edges VALUES (1, '{"key": "value"}'), (2, NULL), (3, '{"key": 5.67}');
SELECT distinctJSONPaths(json) FROM test_json_edges WHERE json != CAST('{' AS JSON) AND json != (SELECT json FROM test_json_edges WHERE id = 1);
SELECT id, distinctJSONPaths(json) FROM test_json_edges GROUP BY id HAVING id != 2;
CREATE TABLE temp_json AS SELECT * FROM test_json_edges WHERE json IS NOT NULL; SELECT distinctJSONPaths(json) FROM temp_json WHERE distinctJSONPaths(json) != ['key'];

SELECT distinctJSONPaths(json) FROM (SELECT json FROM test_json_edges UNION ALL SELECT json FROM test_json WHERE json IS NOT NULL) AS unioned_json WHERE distinctJSONPaths(json) != ['key'] ORDER BY id;
